x-enumeration-literals.name: Low Income Segment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals with limited financial capacity and lower income levels, typically requiring basic financial products and support services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Middle Income Segment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals with moderate income and financial stability, suitable for standard banking products and services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: High Income Segment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals with higher earning capacity and financial resources, often eligible for premium financial products.

x-enumeration-literals.name: High Net Worth Individual
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals with significant accumulated wealth, assets, and investment capacity requiring specialized financial and advisory services.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Student Segment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals primarily engaged in education with limited or no stable income, requiring tailored financial solutions.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Retired Segment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals who are no longer part of the active workforce and rely on savings, pensions, or investments for income.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Self-Employed Segment
x-enumeration-literals.description: Represents individuals earning income through independent business or professional activities rather than salaried employment.
